description: Systematically refactor the yt-translate codebase to reduce technical debt, eliminate code duplication, and improve maintainability while maintaining backwards compatibility with existing API contracts.

userStories.title: Create Shared Languages Module
userStories.description: As a developer, I want language mappings in a single shared module so that I don't have duplicate dictionaries across files.
acceptanceCriteria: New file `languages.py` created in project root
`cloud_translate.py` imports from `languages.py` instead of defining locally
`translate.py` imports from `languages.py` instead of defining locally
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 1. Created languages.py with all dictionaries and both files import from it.

userStories.title: Add Proper Logging Infrastructure
userStories.description: As a developer, I want proper logging with configurable levels so that I can debug issues effectively in production.
acceptanceCriteria: All 19 `print()` statements replaced with appropriate `logger.info()`, `logger.warning()`, or `logger.error()` calls
Log level configurable via `LOG_LEVEL` environment variable
Logs include job_id context where applicable
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 2. Replaced 22 print statements (not 19 as originally stated) with logger calls.

userStories.title: Extract Configuration Constants
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all magic numbers in named constants so that configuration is centralized and self-documenting.
acceptanceCriteria: New `config.py` file created with all constants

Constants include: GOOGLE_TRANSLATE_CHUNK_SIZE, LLM_MAX_SEGMENTS_PER_BATCH, LLM_BATCH_OVERLAP, LLM_MAX_TOKENS, LLM_TEMPERATURE, CHATTERBOX_SAMPLE_RATE, VOICE_SAMPLE_DURATION_SECONDS, MIN_VOICE_SAMPLE_DURATION, MAX_VOICE_SAMPLE_DURATION, SIGNED_URL_EXPIRATION
All hardcoded Replicate model names moved to config
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 3. Created config.py with all constants plus additional ones (SIGNED_URL_EXPIRATION_LONG, CHATTERBOX_CFG_WEIGHT, CHATTERBOX_EXAGGERATION, BACKGROUND_VOLUME_DEFAULT). All 4 Replicate model names extracted.

userStories.title: Extract Access Control Helper
userStories.description: As a developer, I want access control logic in a reusable function so that I don't have duplicate permission checks.
acceptanceCriteria: Both `get_preview_status` and `get_preview_video` endpoints use this helper
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 4. Created verify_preview_access helper function that extracts duplicate access control logic from both endpoints.

userStories.title: Extract Audio Helper Functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want audio utility functions in a separate module so that they are testable and reusable.
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 5. Created utils/audio_helpers.py with all 3 functions. Removed 50 lines of inline function definitions from cloud_translate.py.

userStories.title: Consolidate Storage Upload Functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single generic upload function so that storage logic isn't duplicated.
acceptanceCriteria: New function `upload_to_storage(bucket, job_id, file_path, filename, content_type) -> str` in db.py
Original function signatures preserved as wrappers for backwards compatibility
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 6. Created generic upload_to_storage function. All 3 upload functions now use it as wrappers. Consolidated VOICE_SAMPLES_BUCKET constant. Net reduction of ~48 lines.

userStories.title: Consolidate Signed URL Functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single generic signed URL function so that URL generation logic isn't duplicated.
acceptanceCriteria: New function `get_signed_url(bucket, storage_path, expires_in=3600) -> str` in db.py
Original function signatures preserved as wrappers for backwards compatibility
All signed URL generation works identically
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 7. Created generic get_signed_url function. All 3 signed URL functions now use it as wrappers.

userStories.title: Create Unified Pipeline Function
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single parameterized pipeline function so that the 3 duplicate processing functions are consolidated.
acceptanceCriteria: New function `process_video_translation(job_id, video_url, target_language, duration_limit, job_type)` created
Function uses appropriate DB update callback based on job_type
Original function signatures preserved for backwards compatibility
All three job types process identically to before

userStories.title: Add Unit Tests for Audio Helpers
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for audio helper functions so that refactoring doesn't break functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests for `read_wav_file` with valid WAV file
Tests for `write_wav_file` creates valid WAV file
Tests for `resample_audio` produces correct sample rate

userStories.title: Add Unit Tests for Language Module
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying language mappings are complete and consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Test that all `SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES` keys exist in `GOOGLE_LANG_CODES`
Test that all language codes are valid ISO 639-1 codes

userStories.title: Add Integration Test for Pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an integration test ensuring the unified pipeline works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test that `process_video_translation` with job_type='preview' matches old behavior
Test that `process_video_translation` with job_type='paid' matches old behavior
Mock external APIs (Replicate, OpenAI) in tests
